sectionLabelZh: 限时论证写作 · 满托原创
rightsNotice: 三道题目均为满托独立命题；官方资料只用于核对三选一、40 分钟与 750 词上限。

sourceAnchors.usedFor: three-prompt interaction and word-limit boundary only

prompts.title: Automated public decisions
prompts.prompt: Public bodies should never use automated systems to make decisions that materially affect individuals. Discuss.

prompts.title: Community service
prompts.prompt: Universities should require every undergraduate to complete a period of community service before graduating. To what extent do you agree?

prompts.title: Misleading health claims
prompts.prompt: When, if ever, should governments restrict health claims made by public figures on social media?

runs.value: Choose one of the three prompts and write a clear, reasoned response in English.
